title: Agentic Test Suite
description: Agent-delegation test suite for agentic CLI exec. Optimized for minimal token consumption. Compatible with ~/.claude/scripts/run-testcases.sh.

suite.description: Identifier for the test suite (kebab-case). Used in session seed derivation.

runner.description: Command prefix used to invoke exec steps. Appended with: exec "<cmd>" --agentic --format json --session-seed <seed> --project <project> --mode <mode>. Supports {suite_dir} placeholder (resolved to the directory containing this file). Example: "dotnet run --project {suite_dir}/../src/unifocl/unifocl.csproj --disable-build-servers -v minimal --"

project.description: Path to the target project. Overridden by --project CLI arg. Relative to suite file directory.

mode.description: Default context mode for all steps. Can be overridden per-step.

id.description: Unique case identifier (kebab-case). Used as part of session seed.

predict.description: 'pass': all step assertions must hold. 'fail': at least one step is expected to fail (regression guard). Unexpected outcomes are runner failures.

steps.description: Ordered command steps. State is shared across steps via a per-case session seed. Include any setup (e.g. /init) as early steps.

cmd.description: Unifocl command text, passed verbatim to `unifocl exec`. Example: "/dump hierarchy" or "/mutate [{\"op\":\"create\"}]".

assert.description: Assertions against the AgenticResponseEnvelope JSON. If omitted, defaults to { ".status": "ok", ".meta.exitCode": 0 }.

mode.description: Override context mode for this step only.

AssertMap.description: Keys are jq path expressions (e.g. ".status", ".data.allOk", ".errors | length"). Values are expected scalars or operator objects.

AssertOperator.description: Special assertion operators for non-equality checks.

$exists.description: true: path must not be null/missing. false: path must be null/missing.

$ne.description: Path value must not equal this.

$gt.description: Path value must be greater than this number.

$gte.description: Path value must be >= this number.

$contains.description: Path value (string or array) must contain this substring or element.
